nasb.text: So Jacob came to Luz (that is, Bethel), which is in the land of Canaan, he and all the people who were with him.

esv.text: And Jacob came to Luz (that is, Bethel), which is in the land of Canaan, he and all the people who were with him,

cnv.text: 於是雅各和與他在一起的人，到了迦南地的路斯，就是伯特利。

ccb.text: 雅各和所有的随从来到迦南的路斯，也就是伯特利。

csbs.text: 这样雅各和所有与他一起的民众，来到迦南地的路斯，就是伯特利。
